subject: API Key Expiration Warning

subject: New Feature: Multi-Chain Notification Support
body: Herald now supports notifications for Solana, Ethereum, and Polygon protocols. Configure cross-chain alerts from your dashboard. Single API, unified delivery. No additional setup required.

subject: Introducing Telegram Inline Notifications
body: Get real-time alerts directly in Telegram via @useheraldbot. Set up instant notifications for liquidations, proposals, and price movements. Private, encrypted, and always available.

subject: Herald Enterprise Plan: Custom DKIM & Webhooks
body: Scale your protocol with custom DKIM signatures, 20 webhook endpoints, and 250k monthly sends. $299/month USDC. First month free with code SCALE2026. Upgrade from the billing dashboard.
